title: StorageBox Adapter
description: StorageBox mod addon that able to import to/export from StorageBox
body:
# StorageBox Adapter This mod is an addon that adds adapters for StorageBox.
It allows items to be inserted and extracted from StorageBox using hoppers and industrial mod devices. This is an addon for [StorageBox for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagebox-fabric). [Forge/NeoForge version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storagebox-adapter)
